ground_truth.title: Installing CiviCRM with Drupal 11 on Upsun
ground_truth.author: Mark Hanna
ground_truth.main_content: CiviCRM is a popular open source CRM that integrates with a number of Content Management Systems including Drupal, Wordpress, and Joomla, or can be installed standalone. This guide describes how to set up and install CiviCRM on Drupal 11 using Upsun's infrastructure. This article shows how to install CiviCRM on Drupal 11 using a ready-to-use composer template, deploy the project on Upsun with a production-ready configuration, and apply best practices developed from running CiviCRM sites in production over many years. You can view the CiviCRM Drupal template here. This template is derived from an Upsun Drupal 11 starting template, and includes an upsun config.yaml which expands on the default with best practices and additions particular to CiviCRM. Before installation, you must update 3 environment variables in the Upsun Variables UI: CIVICRM_SITE_KEY, CIVICRM_CRED_KEY and CIVICRM_SIGN_KEY. You must also install CiviCRM via the Extend page at /admin/modules and find CiviCRM to install it. The guide covers detailed configuration including databases, Nginx/PHP settings, template cache file mounts, cron setup, environment variables, CiviCRM caching, and adding CiviCRM extensions.
with: CiviCRM is a popular open source CRM that integrates with a number of Content Management Systems including Drupal, Wordpress, and Joomla, or can be installed standalone.
This article shows how to install CiviCRM on Drupal 11 using a ready-to-use composer template and deploy the project on Upsun with a production-ready configuration.
You can view the CiviCRM Drupal template here. This template is derived from an Upsun Drupal 11 starting template, and includes an upsun config.yaml.
Before installation of CiviCRM, you must update 3 environment variables in the Upsun Variables UI: CIVICRM_SITE_KEY, CIVICRM_CRED_KEY and CIVICRM_SIGN_KEY.
A proper civicrm.settings.php is already included in this template, and everything will work automatically.
